rows.label: tlk43500142_07_msg0001
rows.name:
Old though I may be,
I was once a Merc Group leader!
I won't flee at a time like this!

rows.label: tlk43500142_07_msg0002
rows.name:
While I draw their attention,
prioritize evacuating
the civilians!

rows.label: tlk43500142_07_msg0003
rows.name:
If I do this, should I survive,
the state will treat me well.

rows.label: tlk43500142_07_msg0004
rows.name:
Mercenaries fight for their own gain!
It simply ends up saving lives!
